steps: File French Form 5001 with impots.gouv.fr to reclaim EUR 3,744.00 excess withholding tax on TotalEnergies SE dividends
Submit supporting documentation: BNP Paribas statement, Norwegian tax residency certificate, and FR-NO treaty rate verification (15%)
Reference CLIENT06 account 901234567 and specify ISIN FR0000120271 with 320,000 shares in reimbursement claim
Follow up with BNP Paribas to ensure proper treaty rate application for future TotalEnergies distributions

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
